aiPrompts.6: Generate a detailed periodic evaluation for a Grade 6 student named {name} who scored {percentage}% with {gradePoint} grade and {attendance}% attendance. Their conduct is {conduct}. Write 4-5 sentences covering: 1) Academic strengths, 2) Areas needing improvement, 3) Behavioral and participation observations, 4) Suggestions for parents. Keep it professional, specific, and constructive.
aiPrompts.7: Generate a detailed periodic evaluation for a Grade 7 student named {name} who scored {percentage}% with {gradePoint} grade and {attendance}% attendance. Their conduct is {conduct}. Write 4-5 sentences covering: 1) Subject-wise performance overview, 2) Critical thinking and problem-solving skills, 3) Classroom participation, 4) Goals for next evaluation period. Keep it professional and forward-looking.
aiPrompts.8: Generate a detailed periodic evaluation for a Grade 8 student named {name} who scored {percentage}% with {gradePoint} grade and {attendance}% attendance. Their conduct is {conduct}. Write 4-5 sentences covering: 1) Academic readiness for high school, 2) Strengths and challenges, 3) Extra-curricular involvement, 4) Recommendations for improvement. Keep it mature and college-preparatory in tone.

remarksRules.80-89: Excellent — Student regularly meets and often exceeds expectations.
remarksRules.70-79: Good — Student meets most expectations with occasional lapses.
remarksRules.60-69: Satisfactory — Student meets basic expectations but requires monitoring.
remarksRules.below-60: Needs Improvement — Student is below expectations and requires additional support.
